name: angry-pixel-app-skeleton
description: Multiplatform Angry Pixel Engine monorepo (browser, desktop, mobile)

scripts.build: npm run build -w @angry-pixel-app/game && npm run build -w @angry-pixel-app/browser
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build -w @angry-pixel-app/game && npm run build -w @angry-pixel-app/browser && npm run build -w @angry-pixel-app/desktop
scripts.build:android: npm run bundle:web-for-mobile && npm run eas:build:android -w @angry-pixel-app/mobile
